_provisioning_note: ElevenLabs Create Tool payload for the GOVERNED booking tool (POST https://api.elevenlabs.io/v1/convai/tools, xi-api-key header). Replaces the direct Cal.com 'calcom_create_booking' integration: booking goes through GuideHerd, which books strictly inside the durable booking context issued by get_offered_slots — the agent cannot supply an event type, route, or arbitrary timestamp. AUTH_CONNECTION_ID is environment-specific — substitute the workspace's GuideHerd auth connection before submitting; secrets never appear in source control. Booking OUTCOMES ride HTTP 200 with a deterministic status the agent must act on: 'booked' (confirmed and durably recorded — only now may the agent say the appointment is scheduled), 'rejected'/'expired' (NOT scheduled — apologize, offer a fresh availability check), 'verification_required' (neither confirm nor deny — the office follows up; report the outcome as escalated). Any HTTP error: apologize, never claim booked, escalate.

tool_config.name: create_booking
tool_config.description: Book the appointment the caller selected. Call this exactly once, only after the caller confirms their selection. Pass the bookingContext exactly as returned by the most recent get_offered_slots response, the exact startsAt of the option the caller chose, and the caller's contact details collected earlier. Never construct or adjust a time yourself; if the caller wants a different time, run a new availability check instead. Act on the returned status: 'booked' means scheduled; 'rejected' or 'expired' mean NOT scheduled; 'verification_required' means the office must confirm — do not tell the caller it is scheduled and do not tell them it failed.

request_body_schema.description: One governed booking attempt inside a booking context issued by get_offered_slots. GuideHerd validates, books the correct calendar server-side, and records the durable outcome.

bookingContext.description: The opaque bookingContext value from the most recent get_offered_slots response, copied exactly. Never alter, shorten, or invent it.

startsAt.description: The exact startsAt timestamp of the appointment option the caller selected, copied exactly as get_offered_slots returned it (ISO 8601 UTC). Must be one of the returned options.

attendee.description: The caller's contact details collected earlier in the conversation.

email.description: The caller's email address for the appointment confirmation.

phoneNumber.description: The caller's callback phone number in international format (e.g. +12565550100). Omit if not collected.

sessionId.description: The sessionId returned by get_prepared_caller, copied exactly, when a prepared session exists. Omit it entirely otherwise — never fabricate one.
